content_fingerprint: hugging face community guide shows how to run ai agents for automated outreach at scale a new community authored guide on hugging face demonstrates how to deploy ai agents to automate large scale outreach workflows offering a practical template for teams looking to move beyond one off api calls hugging face has published a community guide by longtime contributor niels rogge detailing how to run ai agents that automate outreach operations at scale the post published april 27 2026 outlines an agent based workflow designed to handle repetitive outreach tasks without manual intervention per contac
